evidence_used: valuation_snapshot: PE=-0.83, PB=4.63, negative net margin -429%
sentiment_community_ownership_evidence: analyst ratings 2 Strong Buy / 3 Buy (as of 2025-03-01)
evidence_missing: alternative_data_features: most adapters not_connected (github_public, biotech_clinical, etc.)
information_integrity_assessment: pollution-defense layer not implemented in v1
baseline_solo.reasoning_summary: PSTV exhibits a sharp 5-day drawdown (-53.9%) following a private placement announcement (2025-03-04, $15M gross proceeds). Wikipedia pageviews spike to 150 on decision day, and relative volume is 2.5x normal. However, fundamental data is insufficient (no PIT-safe quarterly filings), valuation metrics are distorted (negative PE, negative net margin -429%), and the macro regime is restrictive (equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution). Alternative data is sparse (adapters not wired), ownership data unavailable, and narrative gap assessment is pending. The private placement itself is a positive catalyst for a clinical-stage biotech, but the magnitude of the drawdown, combined with missing fundamentals and insufficient external corroboration, prevents a confident buy or short decision. Macro regime caps equity allocation at 20% and mandates strict quality/valuation caution. Fail-closed per anti-hindsight and missing-data policy.
risk_flags: Fundamental data absent: no PIT-safe quarterly filings
Price action extreme: -53.9% in 5 days post-announcement
Clinical-stage biotech: high execution risk, no revenue scale
Alternative data sparse: adapters not wired, GitHub unmapped, 13F unavailable
Ownership data missing: no institutional positioning, no insider activity in 90d
Narrative gap assessment pending: cannot confirm catalyst-price alignment
suggested_improvements: Wire alternative-data adapters (biotech_clinical, sec_13f) to capture clinical trial progress and institutional positioning
Implement pollution-defense layer in information_integrity_assessment to validate private placement narrative
Obtain PIT-safe quarterly fundamentals (Q4 2024 or Q1 2025 filing) to assess burn rate and runway
Evaluate insider trading (Form 4) around private placement pricing to assess management confidence
Cross-check Wikipedia pageview spike against Reddit/social sentiment to rule out meme-stock dynamics
Assess private placement terms (dilution, warrant coverage, investor identity) via 8-K full text extraction

data_quality_flags.detail: github_public: unmapped_ticker — PSTV not in ticker_to_github.csv
valuation_snapshot.valuation_inputs flagged not_PIT_safe; TTM ratios have no fiscal anchor
sec_8k_fulltext: stub mode (opencli binary not installed); filing text not ground truth
price_snapshot.live_quote at 2026-05-07T20:00:00+00:00 is after allowed_data_cutoff; using last_eod_close=8.75

baseline_solo.schema_or_prompt_weakness_notes: v1 evidence packet lacks LLM-driven narrative_price_gap_assessment and information_integrity_assessment pollution-defense layer. Alternative-data adapters are mostly not_connected, limiting external corroboration. Fundamental snapshot is insufficient_evidence, blocking quality_long sleeve eligibility. Without these blocks, a single-agent baseline cannot confidently assess whether the private placement catalyst justifies the 53.9% drawdown or whether the stock is a short candidate. Fail-closed per rule §13.4 and §13.6.
recommended_followups: Await Q1 2025 earnings (expected ~May 2025) to obtain PIT-safe fundamentals and assess cash burn
Monitor insider Form 4 filings for 30 days post-private-placement to gauge management confidence
Re-evaluate when alternative-data adapters (biotech_clinical, sec_13f) are wired and return data
Reassess if macro regime shifts from Overheat/Restrictive to Risk-On (would relax equity_discipline)
If price stabilizes above $8.00 and volume normalizes, revisit as potential quality_long candidate
baseline_solo.reason: Insufficient evidence to support buy or short. Fundamentals unavailable (status=insufficient_evidence), alternative data sparse (adapters not_connected), ownership data missing, narrative gap assessment pending. Macro regime restrictive (equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution). Private placement is positive catalyst but 53.9% drawdown magnitude and distorted valuation metrics (PE=-0.83, net_margin=-429%) prevent confident decision. Fail-closed per missing-data policy.
risk_notes: Macro regime caps equity allocation at 20% and mandates strict quality/valuation caution; PSTV fails quality bar due to negative profitability and missing fundamentals
Clinical-stage biotech with no revenue scale; private placement ($15M) extends runway but burn rate unknown
Valuation metrics distorted: negative PE, negative ROA, negative net margin (-429%); TTM ratios not PIT-safe
Price action extreme: -53.9% in 5 days; relative volume 2.5x normal; Wikipedia pageviews spike to 150 — suggests retail attention but no institutional corroboration
Alternative data sparse: GitHub unmapped, 13F unavailable, biotech_clinical adapter not wired; cannot assess clinical trial progress or institutional positioning
Ownership data absent: no Form 4 insider activity in 90 days, no 13F institutional holdings, no community size metrics
Narrative gap assessment pending: cannot confirm whether private placement announcement justifies drawdown or signals distress
Information integrity assessment incomplete: pollution-defense layer not implemented in v1; cannot rule out meme-stock or coordinated campaign dynamics

veto_conditions_evaluated.note: information_integrity_assessment.use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false per v1 schema, but this is a descriptor-only layer; no hard veto triggered

veto_conditions_evaluated.note: data_after_cutoff_used=false; lookahead_safe=true; all evidence within allowed_data_cutoff (2025-03-06T09:30:00-05:00)

rule_engine_path: 3. Check alternative_data_features.adapter_selection → most adapters not_connected → VETO candidate
6. Evaluate macro_regime: Overheat/Moderately Restrictive (stress_score=2) → equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution → RESTRICT equity positions
7. Evaluate candidate_type: quality_long (private placement positive catalyst) vs surge_short (53.9% drawdown) → insufficient evidence for either sleeve
8. Collapse decision to no_trade per fail-closed policy
decision_log: T+0: Read envelope → lookahead_safe=true, data_after_cutoff_used=false → proceed

T+1: Assess catalyst (news_event_summary) → private placement $15M (2025-03-04), positive for clinical-stage biotech, but narrative_price_gap_assessment not_evaluated → cannot confirm alignment with 53.9% drawdown

T+2: Assess external corroboration (alternative_data_features) → Wikipedia pageviews spike to 150 (2025-03-06), but most adapters not_connected (github_public, biotech_clinical, sec_13f) → insufficient alt-data verification
T+3: Assess fundamentals (fundamental_snapshot) → status=insufficient_evidence; no PIT-safe quarterly filings → cannot assess burn rate, runway, or profitability
T+4: Assess valuation (valuation_snapshot) → PE=-0.83, PB=4.63, net_margin=-429%, ROA=-1.37% → distorted metrics, TTM not PIT-safe → fails quality bar

T+5: Assess ownership (sentiment_community_ownership_evidence) → ownership_positioning not_evaluated, community_size not_evaluated, no Form 4 insider activity in 90d → no institutional or insider signal

T+6: Assess macro regime (macro_regime) → Overheat/Moderately Restrictive (stress_score=2), equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution, equity_allocation_cap=20% → RESTRICT equity positions, mandate strict quality/valuation caution

T+7: Evaluate sleeve eligibility → quality_long: fails (fundamentals insufficient, valuation distorted, macro restrictive) → surge_short: fails (insufficient evidence of distress, private placement is positive catalyst, no short thesis corroborated)
T+8: Evaluate veto conditions → insufficient_evidence=true, missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance=true → VETO
T+9: Collapse decision to no_trade per fail-closed policy; position_size_pct=0.0
baseline_solo.community_attention_risk_note: Wikipedia pageviews spike to 150 on 2025-03-06 (vs. baseline ~100-120); relative volume 2.5x normal. Suggests retail attention but no institutional corroboration (13F unavailable, ownership_positioning not_evaluated). Meme-stock risk cannot be ruled out without sentiment/social data.
baseline_solo.unverified_claim_note: Private placement announcement (2025-03-04) is T1 source (GlobeNewswire/SEC 8-K), but narrative_price_gap_assessment not_evaluated; cannot confirm whether announcement justifies 53.9% drawdown or signals distress.
baseline_solo.thesis_confirmation_block_reason: fundamental_snapshot.status=insufficient_evidence; alternative_data_features mostly not_connected; narrative_price_gap_assessment not_evaluated; information_integrity_assessment pollution-defense layer not implemented in v1. Per rule §13.6 (null-block-handling), when essential blocks are absent, fail-closed to no_trade.
baseline_solo.sentiment_risk_adjustment_note: sentiment_community_ownership_evidence.market_sentiment: analyst ratings 2 Strong Buy / 3 Buy (as of 2025-03-01), but sentiment_score null, sentiment_change_* null, credibility_adjusted_sentiment null. Insufficient sentiment data to adjust decision.
baseline_solo.ownership_risk_adjustment_note: ownership_positioning not_evaluated; no 13F data (not_available_on_current_plan), no Form 4 insider activity in 90 days, no community_size metrics. Cannot assess institutional sponsorship or insider confidence.
baseline_solo.institutional_sponsorship_note: No institutional ownership data available (13F not_available_on_current_plan). Cannot assess sponsorship or crowding risk.
baseline_solo.smart_money_benchmark_note: No smart-money positioning data available. Analyst ratings (2 Strong Buy / 3 Buy as of 2025-03-01) are descriptors only and do not override missing fundamentals or macro restrictions.
